module: 状态机与调度引擎模块
description: Implement WorkerRunner ReAct execution loop in run() method
steps: Check `isResumingFromSuspension`. If false, call `InjectionEngine` and append initial prompt.
Enter the `while(running)` ReAct loop.
Call `CircuitBreaker.checkAndIncrement()` at the start of each iteration.
Fetch context via `LocalStreamManager` and invoke `LlmClient.chat()`.
If response contains tool calls, iterate and execute via `ToolRegistry`.
Wrap tool execution in try-catch to specifically catch `SuspendExecutionException`.
If caught, call `SuspendResumeEngine.suspendForApproval()` and completely exit the thread (break loop).
If tools succeed, append `ToolResult` to local stream and continue loop.
When no more tool calls (task complete), call `CondensationEngine`, update Task status to COMPLETED, and exit.
reference_docs: 状态机与调度引擎模块设计.md

module: 状态机与调度引擎模块
description: Verify WorkerRunner ReAct loop, CircuitBreaker integration, and suspension exit
steps: Mock LlmClient to simulate a conversation that outputs a tool call, then a final text answer.
Verify that CircuitBreaker is incremented exactly as many times as the loop iterations.
Mock a tool execution to throw SuspendExecutionException.
Verify that SuspendResumeEngine is called and the worker thread naturally terminates without throwing unhandled exceptions.
Verify CondensationEngine is called upon successful completion.
reference_docs: 状态机与调度引擎模块设计.md

module: 状态机与调度引擎模块
description: Implement MasterRunner global orchestration loop in run() method
steps: Fetch global context via `GlobalStreamManager`.
Invoke LLM to clarify user intent. If unclear, push interactive question via `UICardRenderer` and yield.
Once clear, execute environment exploration using read-only tools.
Call `PlanningTool` explicitly to generate the `execution_plan` JSON array.
Iterate over the generated plan, calling `TaskManager.createWorkerTask` for each.
Trigger `WorkerRunner.run()` for each child task and strictly wait/monitor for their COMPLETED status.
Upon all workers completing, generate final summary via `UICardRenderer` and transition Master state to COMPLETED.
reference_docs: 状态机与调度引擎模块设计.md

module: 状态机与调度引擎模块
description: Verify MasterRunner intent clarification, planning, and worker delegation
steps: Mock LlmClient to output clarification question, and verify UICardRenderer is triggered.
Mock PlanningTool to return a 2-item task array.
Verify that TaskManager creates exactly 2 Worker tasks.
Verify that the Master loops and successfully transitions its own state to COMPLETED only after workers finish.
Verify the final Summary Card is generated.
reference_docs: 状态机与调度引擎模块设计.md

steps: Create ZhipuLlmClient class implementing LlmClient interface in src/main/java/tech/yesboss/llm/impl/
Add constructor accepting: apiKey (String), model (String, default 'glm-4-flash'), maxTokens (int, default 4096), temperature (double, default 0.7)
Implement chat() method to call Zhipu GLM API endpoint: https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/chat/completions
Handle request conversion: convert UnifiedMessage list to Zhipu API format (messages array with role/content)
Support systemPrompt injection as a system message at the beginning of messages array
Implement response parsing: convert Zhipu API response back to UnifiedMessage format
Handle tool_calls in Zhipu response: extract id, name, arguments and create UnifiedMessage.ToolCall list
Implement summarize() method using the same chat endpoint with a summarization prompt
Add HTTP client dependency if needed (OkHttp or Java 11 HttpClient)
Add error handling for: 401 (invalid API key), 429 (rate limit), 500 (server error)
Add request timeout configuration (connectTimeout: 10s, readTimeout: 60s)
Add logging for: API requests, responses, errors, token usage
Create test configuration in application-test.yml for Zhipu settings
Document API key setup in README (environment variable: ZHIPU_API_KEY)

module: 状态机与调度引擎模块
description: Implement simple test tools for integration testing
steps: Create CalculatorTool class implementing AgentTool interface in src/test/java/tech/yesboss/tool/
Implement getName() returning 'calculator'
Implement getDescription() returning 'A simple calculator that can add, subtract, multiply, and divide numbers'
Implement getParametersJsonSchema() returning JSON schema for: operation (enum: add/subtract/multiply/divide), a (number), b (number)
Implement execute() parsing argumentsJson and performing the calculation, returning result as string
Create EchoTool class implementing AgentTool interface
Implement echo functionality that returns the input text exactly as received
Add error handling for division by zero and invalid operations in CalculatorTool
Register these tools in ToolRegistry for testing purposes
reference_docs: 统一工具链与沙箱模块设计.md
状态机与调度引擎模块设计.md

module: 状态机与调度引擎模块
description: Integration test for WorkerRunner ReAct loop with real Zhipu LLM
steps: Create WorkerRunnerIntegrationTest class in src/test/java/tech/yesboss/runner/
Add @Test method testWorkerReActLoopWithRealLlm()
Read ZHIPU_API_KEY from .env file using dotenv library or System.getenv()
Initialize real ZhipuLlmClient with the API key and model='glm-4-flash'
Create real ToolRegistry and register CalculatorTool and EchoTool
Mock all other dependencies: TaskManager, LocalStreamManager, InjectionEngine, CondensationEngine, CircuitBreaker, SandboxInterceptor, SuspendResumeEngine, ToolCallTracker
Configure TaskManager mock: sessionExists returns true, getParentSessionId returns 'master-1', getStatus returns COMPLETED after worker run
Configure LocalStreamManager mock: fetchContext returns empty list initially, then append messages to track ReAct loop
Configure InjectionEngine mock: injectInitialContext returns a system UnifiedMessage with calculator task description
Create WorkerRunnerImpl with mocked dependencies and real ZhipuLlmClient via ModelRouter
Call workerRunner.run(testSessionId) and wait for completion
Verify ReAct loop executed: check LocalStreamManager.appendWorkerMessage was called multiple times
Verify tool was executed: CalculatorTool.execute was called with valid arguments
Verify completion: TaskManager.transitionState was called with COMPLETED status
Verify CondensationEngine.condenseAndMergeUpwards was called once
Add assertions for LLM response format and tool call structure
Add timeout handling (max 60 seconds for test completion)
Add cleanup code to shutdown executor services
Log actual LLM responses and tool executions for debugging
Mark test as @Disabled if ZHIPU_API_KEY is not set
reference_docs: 状态机与调度引擎模块设计.md
双流上下文管理模块设计.md

module: 状态机与调度引擎模块
description: Integration test for Master-Worker orchestration with real Zhipu LLM and thread pool
steps: Create MasterRunnerIntegrationTest class in src/test/java/tech/yesboss/runner/
Add @Test method testMasterWorkerOrchestrationWithRealLlmAndThreadPool()
Read ZHIPU_API_KEY from .env file or environment variable
Initialize two ZhipuLlmClient instances: one for MASTER role (model='glm-4-flash'), one for WORKER role (model='glm-4-flash')
Create ModelRouter with master and worker LlmClient instances
Create real ToolRegistry and register test tools (CalculatorTool, EchoTool)
Create real ExecutorService via Executors.newCachedThreadPool() for virtual thread simulation

Mock infrastructure dependencies: TaskManager, GlobalStreamManager, LocalStreamManager, InjectionEngine, CondensationEngine, CircuitBreaker, SandboxInterceptor, SuspendResumeEngine, ToolCallTracker, PlanningTool, UICardRenderer, IMMessagePusher

Configure TaskManager mock chain for Master session: sessionExists returns true, getStatus returns PLANNING then RUNNING then COMPLETED, createWorkerTask returns 'worker-1', 'worker-2', getImRoute returns mock ImRoute
Configure TaskManager mock chain for Worker sessions: sessionExists returns true, getStatus transitions from RUNNING to COMPLETED, getParentSessionId returns master session ID
Configure GlobalStreamManager mock: fetchContext returns user requirement message list, appendMasterMessage tracks messages
Configure PlanningTool mock: execute returns JSON array with 2 worker tasks
Configure LocalStreamManager mock for workers: fetchContext returns empty list, appendWorkerMessage and appendToolResult track calls
Configure InjectionEngine mock: injectInitialContext returns system prompt with assigned task
Create WorkerRunnerImpl with real ModelRouter and mocked dependencies
Create MasterRunnerImpl with real ModelRouter, real WorkerRunner, and mocked dependencies
Prepare initial context: user message 'Calculate 15 + 27 and then echo the result'
Call masterRunner.run(masterSessionId) to start orchestration
Verify Master created 2 worker tasks: verify TaskManager.createWorkerTask called twice
Verify workers executed in parallel: verify both worker sessions were created and their run() methods called
Verify thread pool was used: check executor.submit was called for each worker
Verify ReAct loops completed: LocalStreamManager.appendWorkerMessage called for both workers
Verify tools executed: CalculatorTool.execute called with arguments for 15+27
Verify final summary: verify condenseAndMergeUpwards called for both workers, generateExecutionReport called
Verify Master completion: TaskManager.transitionState called with COMPLETED for master session
Add assertions for concurrent execution: verify worker run() calls overlapped in time (use timestamps or CountDownLatch)
Add timeout handling: max 120 seconds for entire test (Master + Workers)
Add logging to track thread execution and timing
Test cleanup: shutdown executor, clear all mock states
Add edge case tests: worker failure propagation, worker timeout handling
Mark test as @Disabled if ZHIPU_API_KEY is not set
reference_docs: 状态机与调度引擎模块设计.md
双流上下文管理模块设计.md

module: 状态机与调度引擎模块
description: Integration test for multi-worker concurrent execution with real thread pool
steps: Add @Test method testMultipleWorkersConcurrentExecution() to MasterRunnerIntegrationTest
Setup real ZhipuLlmClient and ModelRouter as in previous test
Configure PlanningTool to return 3 worker tasks (Task 1: add 10+20, Task 2: multiply 5*6, Task 3: divide 100/4)
Create real ExecutorService with newCachedThreadPool()
Configure TaskManager mocks for 3 worker sessions: 'worker-1', 'worker-2', 'worker-3'
Track execution timing: record start and end time for each worker run() call
Create CountDownLatch(3) to synchronize worker completion verification
Execute masterRunner.run() and await completion with timeout
Verify concurrent execution: check that workers ran in overlapping time windows (not strictly sequential)
Verify all workers completed: all 3 worker sessions transitioned to COMPLETED
Verify thread pool usage: executor.submit was called exactly 3 times
Verify isolation: each worker's LocalStreamManager calls used unique session IDs
Verify tool execution: CalculatorTool.execute called with different arguments for each worker
Add stress test: configure PlanningTool to return 5 workers, verify all complete within timeout
Test error isolation: make one worker fail, verify others still complete
Test thread pool exhaustion: submit more workers than pool size, verify queueing behavior
Add performance metrics: log total execution time, per-worker time, throughput
Verify no race conditions: all shared resources (TaskManager, repositories) handle concurrent access correctly
Add assertions for thread safety: no ConcurrentModificationException or data corruption
reference_docs: 状态机与调度引擎模块设计.md
双流上下文管理模块设计.md
